# omada_site_settings (Resource)

Manages the settings for an Omada site. This is a singleton resource — each site has exactly one settings object. Creating this resource adopts the existing settings and applies your configuration. Destroying it removes the resource from Terraform state without changing settings on the controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Site settings is a singleton resource -- each site has exactly one.
# Creating this resource adopts the existing settings.
# Destroying it removes the resource from Terraform state without
# changing settings on the controller.
resource "omada_site_settings" "example" {
  led_enable          = true
  mesh_enable         = true
  fast_roaming_enable = true
  lldp_enable         = true

  band_steering_enable               = true
  band_steering_connection_threshold = 30
  band_steering_difference_threshold = 4
  band_steering_max_failures         = 5

  device_account_username = "admin"
  device_account_password = "device-password"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `advanced_feature_enable` (Boolean) Enable advanced features.
- `ai_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Enable AI-based roaming optimization.
- `airtime_fairness_2g` (Boolean) Enable airtime fairness for 2.4GHz band.
- `airtime_fairness_5g` (Boolean) Enable airtime fairness for 5GHz band.
- `airtime_fairness_6g` (Boolean) Enable airtime fairness for 6GHz band.
- `alert_delay` (Number) Alert delay in seconds.
- `alert_delay_enable` (Boolean) Enable alert delay (suppress alerts for a period after triggering).
- `alert_enable` (Boolean) Enable alert notifications.
- `auto_upgrade_enable` (Boolean) Enable automatic firmware upgrade for devices.
- `band_steering_connection_threshold` (Number) Band steering connection threshold.
- `band_steering_difference_threshold` (Number) Band steering difference threshold.
- `band_steering_enable` (Boolean) Enable band steering to push clients to 5GHz.
- `band_steering_max_failures` (Number) Band steering maximum failures before giving up.
- `band_steering_multi_band_mode` (Number) Multi-band steering mode: 0=disabled, 1=prefer 5GHz.
- `beacon_interval_6g` (Number) Beacon interval for 6GHz (in TUs, e.g. 100).
- `beacon_interval_mode_2g` (Number) Beacon interval mode for 2.4GHz (0=default).
- `beacon_interval_mode_5g` (Number) Beacon interval mode for 5GHz (0=default).
- `beacon_interval_mode_6g` (Number) Beacon interval mode for 6GHz (0=default).
- `device_account_password` (String, Sensitive) Password for SSH/management access to devices.
- `device_account_username` (String) Username for SSH/management access to devices.
- `dtim_period_2g` (Number) DTIM period for 2.4GHz.
- `dtim_period_5g` (Number) DTIM period for 5GHz.
- `dtim_period_6g` (Number) DTIM period for 6GHz.
- `dual_band_11k_report_enable` (Boolean) Enable dual-band 802.11k neighbor reports.
- `fast_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Enable 802.11r Fast BSS Transition (fast roaming).
- `force_disassociation_enable` (Boolean) Enable forced disassociation for roaming.
- `fragmentation_threshold_2g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold for 2.4GHz.
- `fragmentation_threshold_5g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold for 5GHz.
- `fragmentation_threshold_6g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold for 6GHz.
- `led_enable` (Boolean) Enable AP LED lights.
- `lldp_enable` (Boolean) Enable LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol).
- `mesh_auto_failover` (Boolean) Enable automatic mesh failover.
- `mesh_default_gateway` (Boolean) Enable default gateway for mesh.
- `mesh_enable` (Boolean) Enable mesh networking.
- `mesh_full_sector` (Boolean) Enable full sector for mesh.
- `non_ping_pong_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Enable non-ping-pong roaming prevention.
- `non_stick_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Enable non-sticky client roaming.
- `region` (String) The region/country for the site (e.g., 'Romania').
- `remember_device_enable` (Boolean) Enable remember device feature.
- `remote_log_enable` (Boolean) Enable remote syslog logging.
- `remote_log_more_client_log` (Boolean) Enable additional client logging to syslog.
- `remote_log_port` (Number) Remote syslog server port.
- `remote_log_server` (String) Remote syslog server address.
- `rts_threshold_2g` (Number) RTS/CTS threshold for 2.4GHz.
- `rts_threshold_5g` (Number) RTS/CTS threshold for 5GHz.
- `rts_threshold_6g` (Number) RTS/CTS threshold for 6GHz.
- `scenario` (String) The site scenario: 'Home', 'Office', 'Hotel', etc.
- `site_name` (String) The display name of the site.
- `speed_test_enable` (Boolean) Enable scheduled speed tests.
- `speed_test_interval` (Number) Speed test interval in minutes.
- `timezone` (String) The timezone for the site (e.g., 'Europe/Athens').

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The site ID (used as the resource identifier).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by any string (the import ID is ignored; settings are read
# from the provider's configured site).
terraform import omada_site_settings.example settings
```
